specAwareGoals.signature: parseSpecFile(specPath: string): { goals: GoalCategory[], context: string }
specAwareGoals.description: Parses a spec file and extracts goal categories and context for pre-populating /new-version goal-gathering.

deferredAutoDiscovery.description: Scans all DEFERRED.md files in the project and returns structured deferred items for researcher briefs.

backward-compatible.description: /new-version without a spec argument behaves identically to the current implementation

spec-reduces-prompts.description: When a spec file is provided, the 5-prompt goal-gathering sequence is collapsed to a single confirmation prompt

deferred-items-included.description: All DEFERRED.md contents are automatically included in researcher briefs without user having to manually select them

definition.scope: Enhance /new-version to accept a spec file for pre-populating goals and auto-discover DEFERRED.md items for researcher briefs.

tasks.description: Add spec file argument parsing to /new-version
tasks.acceptance: Spec path accepted and file contents loaded
Goal categories extracted from spec and presented for confirmation
All deferred items found and included in briefs

tasks.description: Preserve backward compatibility for no-argument invocation
tasks.acceptance: Existing behavior unchanged without spec argument

acceptance: Deferred items always included in research pipeline
